title: Episode 04 Gendos mention of Marduk to Ritsuko
display_title: Episode 04 Gendos mention of Marduk to Ritsuko
wikitext:
[]: Episode 04, Gendo's mention of Marduk to Ritsuko             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Dec 15, 2012 4:33 am A while ago in another topic in another subforum I posted stuff from episode 4 indicating the age of Touji's sister. While I had the file open I ran across this exchange: Episode 4 wrote: RITSUKO: The Third Child is leaving New Tokyo-3 tomorrow. IKARI: Then, we'll reconfigure Unit 01's system for Rei. RITSUKO (OFF): But... IKARI (OFF): Regardless of the results of Unit 00's re-activation experiments, we'll move on to experimenting with Unit 01. IKARI: According to the Marduk Organization's report, the Fourth Child hasn't been found yet. RITSUKO: That means we can't get any pilot replacements?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Dec 16, 2012 3:14 am I would chalk it down to a production/whatever slip-up, no more than a continuity error.

Article: Episode 04 Gendos mention of Marduk to Ritsuko
[]: Episode 04, Gendo's mention of Marduk to Ritsuko             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Dec 15, 2012 4:33 am A while ago in another topic in another subforum I posted stuff from episode 4 indicating the age of Touji's sister. While I had the file open I ran across this exchange: Episode 4 wrote: RITSUKO: The Third Child is leaving New Tokyo-3 tomorrow. IKARI: Then, we'll reconfigure Unit 01's system for Rei. RITSUKO (OFF): But... IKARI (OFF): Regardless of the results of Unit 00's re-activation experiments, we'll move on to experimenting with Unit 01. IKARI: According to the Marduk Organization's report, the Fourth Child hasn't been found yet. RITSUKO: That means we can't get any pilot replacements?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Dec 16, 2012 3:14 am I would chalk it down to a production/whatever slip-up, no more than a continuity error.
